Custom Oval Paper Roll Labels

Premium Kiss-Cut Oval Labels for Professional Branding & Product Packaging

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size Options Quantity Design Method Template Design or Upload File Print Finish Matte or Gloss Production Time Standard 12 Business Days Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Oval Paper Roll Labels for Your Brand

Transform your products, packaging, and promotional materials with our premium oval paper roll labels. These versatile labels combine professional aesthetics with practical functionality, featuring full-color CMYK printing and your choice of matte or gloss finish. Each roll is kiss-cut for easy application and consistent results. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

Perfect for product labeling, brand promotion, event materials, and packaging applications, these custom paper roll labels deliver exceptional print quality and reliable adhesion. Available in three convenient sizes to match your specific branding needs, from small product labels to larger promotional applications.

Our oval paper roll labels are manufactured in the USA using premium materials and state-of-the-art printing technology, ensuring vibrant colors and crisp details that represent your brand professionally. The convenient roll format makes application quick and efficient for high-volume labeling needs.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Oval Paper Roll Labels

Ordering your custom oval paper roll labels is straightforward with our streamlined process. Choose from two convenient design methods: use our online designer to create your labels from scratch, or upload your own print-ready artwork files for professional results.

Design Process

Our user-friendly online designer allows you to quickly create professional oval paper roll labels. Upload your logo or images directly from your computer, or select from our extensive clipart library. The designer provides real-time previews to ensure your labels look exactly as intended before ordering.

For customers uploading original artwork, we require print-ready files in EPS format to ensure the highest quality output. This ensures your oval paper roll labels maintain crisp details and accurate colors throughout the printing process.

Payment

All orders require full payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including VISA, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted but must be received and cleared before your oval paper roll labels enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your oval paper roll labels through every stage of production, from order processing to final shipping. Simply click the tracking link in your email for real-time updates on your order status.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Oval Paper Roll Label Production & Turnaround Times

Understanding production timelines helps you plan your labeling needs effectively. Our standard production time ensures quality results while meeting your project deadlines.

Standard Production Time

Standard production time for oval paper roll labels is 12 business days from artwork approval. This timeframe allows our production team to maintain the highest quality standards while processing your custom labels efficiently.

Production Start Time

Production begins once your artwork is approved and payment is processed. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. If your order requires prepress review or proof approval, production timing starts from the approval confirmation.

Rush Production Options

Emergency and same-day rush options may be available in certain circumstances. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss rush production availability for your oval paper roll labels and any additional fees that may apply.

Remember that total delivery time includes both production time and shipping time. Production time is separate from shipping duration, so factor both elements when planning your label delivery needs.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Kiss-Cut Oval Paper Roll Labels

Our oval paper roll labels use kiss-cut technology for optimal application convenience and professional results. This cutting method provides clean edges while maintaining easy removal from the backing material.

Kiss-Cut Process

Kiss-cutting means the label material is cut through while leaving the backing paper intact. This allows each oval paper roll label to be easily peeled from the roll while maintaining the backing paper's continuity. The process ensures consistent application and prevents waste during the labeling process.

The kiss-cut method is ideal for roll labels because it maintains the roll structure while providing individual labels that remove cleanly. This makes application quick and efficient, especially for high-volume labeling applications.

Benefits of Kiss-Cut Labels

Kiss-cut oval paper roll labels offer several advantages: easy application without tearing, consistent label placement, minimal waste during use, and professional appearance. The backing paper provides stability during storage and transport while allowing smooth dispensing when needed.

This cutting method works particularly well with the oval shape, providing clean curved edges that enhance the professional appearance of your finished labels.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Oval Paper Roll Label Artwork Requirements & File Specifications

Proper artwork preparation ensures your oval paper roll labels print with exceptional quality and accurate colors. Follow these guidelines to achieve professional results that represent your brand effectively.

Preferred File Types

For optimal print quality, submit artwork in Adobe Illustrator EPS (Encapsulated Post Script) or Adobe PDF format. Maximum file size is 100 MB. When using these formats, convert all fonts to outlines or curves to prevent font substitution issues during production.

Additional File Formats

We also accept high-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files. These raster formats work well for photographic elements but require proper resolution settings for crisp oval paper roll label output.

File Setup Guidelines

Set up your artwork proportionate to the exact size you're ordering. Convert all text to outlines to ensure accurate font reproduction. Allow for bleed only when necessary for your design. Never flatten or merge layers in PSD files, and clearly indicate cut lines for optimal production results.

Resolution Requirements

For raster images, use 100% scale at 100 DPI minimum, 50% scale at 200 DPI or higher, 25% scale at 300 DPI or higher, or 10% scale at 600-1200 DPI for best results. Higher resolution ensures sharp details on your finished oval paper roll labels.

If you need artwork assistance, our design services can recreate or optimize your graphics for professional printing results.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Methods for Oval Paper Roll Labels

Your oval paper roll labels ship quickly and securely to ensure they arrive in perfect condition. We offer multiple shipping options to meet your timeline and budget requirements.

Standard Shipping

Orders typically arrive within 2-4 business days after production completion to 90% of the United States via UPS Ground. This shipping time is separate from the production time, so plan accordingly when calculating total delivery time for your oval paper roll labels.

Shipping Speed Options

Choose from Economy (5-15 days), Standard (3-5 business days), Three Day, Two Day, or Overnight shipping. Faster options are available when you need your oval paper roll labels quickly for time-sensitive projects or events.

Tracking and Delivery

You'll receive a tracking number once your package ships, allowing you to monitor delivery progress. For questions about shipping rates or expedited options, contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 before placing your order.

International Shipping

We ship oval paper roll labels internationally through USPS and UPS carriers. International shipments require proper customs documentation and shipping labels provided by the customer. Contact customer service for specific international shipping requirements and procedures.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Application & Usage Guide for Oval Paper Roll Labels

Proper application ensures your oval paper roll labels adhere correctly and maintain their professional appearance. Follow these guidelines for best results across different surfaces and applications.

Surface Preparation

Clean the application surface thoroughly with a lint-free cloth and appropriate cleaner. Remove all dust, oils, and residue that could prevent proper adhesion. Allow the surface to dry completely before applying your oval paper roll labels.

Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, plastic, and metal provide the best adhesion for paper labels. Test adhesion on a small area first when applying to new or untested surface materials.

Application Process

Remove each oval paper roll label from the backing paper carefully to avoid stretching or tearing. Position the label accurately since repositioning may reduce adhesive strength. Apply firm, even pressure from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles and ensure complete contact.

For best results, apply oval paper roll labels at room temperature. Cold conditions can affect initial adhesion, while excessive heat during application may cause the labels to lift or curl.

Professional Application Tips

Use a squeegee or similar tool for larger labels to ensure complete adhesion and eliminate air pockets. Work methodically when applying multiple labels to maintain consistent placement and professional appearance.

Store unused oval paper roll labels in a cool, dry place to maintain adhesive quality and prevent premature aging of the materials.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Oval Paper Roll Labels?

Oval paper roll labels are custom-printed adhesive labels featuring an oval shape and supplied on convenient rolls for easy application. Made from high-quality paper material with permanent adhesive backing, these labels are kiss-cut to allow individual removal while maintaining the roll format. Common applications include product labeling, branding, packaging decoration, event materials, and promotional campaigns where the distinctive oval shape adds visual appeal and professional presentation.

Design Your Perfect Oval Paper Roll Labels Today

Ready to enhance your products and packaging with professional oval paper roll labels? Our streamlined ordering process makes it simple to create custom labels that represent your brand with distinction. Whether you're labeling products, organizing inventory, or promoting your business, these versatile labels deliver the quality and consistency you need.

Choose from multiple size options and finishing choices to match your specific requirements. With full-color CMYK printing, your logos, text, and graphics will display with exceptional clarity and vibrant colors that capture attention and communicate professionalism.

Start your order today using our online designer or upload your print-ready artwork. Our experienced production team ensures every detail meets our quality standards, while our live tracking system keeps you informed throughout the process. Transform your labeling approach with custom roll labels that make your brand stand out.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Oval Paper Roll Label FAQs

What are oval paper roll labels made of?

Oval paper roll labels are made from high-quality paper material with permanent adhesive backing. The paper provides excellent print quality for vibrant colors and sharp text, while the adhesive ensures reliable bonding to most smooth surfaces. Labels are available with matte or gloss finish options to match your design preferences.

What does kiss-cut mean for oval paper roll labels?

Kiss-cut means the label material is cut through while leaving the backing paper intact. This allows each oval paper roll label to peel away easily from the roll while maintaining the backing paper's continuity, making application quick and efficient for high-volume labeling needs.

How do I choose between matte and gloss finishes?

Matte finish provides a non-reflective surface that reduces glare and offers a sophisticated appearance, ideal for text-heavy designs or professional applications. Gloss finish delivers vibrant colors with enhanced shine and durability, perfect for colorful graphics and designs that need to stand out visually.

What file formats work best for oval paper roll labels?

Adobe Illustrator EPS and PDF files provide the highest quality results for oval paper roll labels. These vector formats ensure crisp edges and accurate colors at any size. High-resolution JPG, TIFF, and PNG files also work well, especially for photographic elements in your label design.

Can I use oval paper roll labels on curved surfaces?

Oval paper roll labels work best on flat or gently curved surfaces. While the paper material has some flexibility, sharp curves or highly textured surfaces may cause lifting or poor adhesion. For challenging surface applications, consider testing adhesion on a small area first.

How long do oval paper roll labels last indoors?

When applied to clean, smooth surfaces in indoor environments, oval paper roll labels typically maintain their appearance and adhesion for several years. Factors like temperature fluctuations, humidity, and surface type can affect longevity, but proper application and surface preparation maximize durability.

What sizes are available for oval paper roll labels?

Oval paper roll labels are available in three standard sizes: 0.75" x 1.75", 1.38" x 2.75", and 2.00" x 3.00". These size options accommodate various applications from small product labels to larger promotional and branding applications while maintaining the distinctive oval shape.
